testcase.name: test_create_listing_insufficient_balance

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for insufficient balance, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_listing_fee.py:190: in test_create_listing_insufficient_balance assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for insufficient balance, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for insufficient balance, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_listing_deducts_fee
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_listing_fee.py:225: in test_create_listing_deducts_fee assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for insufficient balance, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
